Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A once in a lifetime opportunity leads Jarrett to North Carolina to the Warriors on the Water Tournament . Veterans are able to compete in a tournament and are honored and appreciated for all they have done
Video.grandparentTitle: Jarrett Edwards Outdoors - Warriors on the Water
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jarrett and his guest Beau Meyer head to 10,000 feet elevation to catch some ice out Colorado trout. Its freezing but the fishing is hot!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The crew heads down to the warm waters off the Florida keys for a giant sailfish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Sport Fishing TV | Florida Keys Sailfish
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Don't sleep on the summer panfish bite! The lion's share of panfishing occurs during the springtime when the fish are concentrated in the shallow waters and also in the winter, but summertime can be absolutely fantastic for bluegill and crappie. Just like other gamefish, they can make dramatic seasonal movements and you'll need to find them first before you can catch them. Today, we're joined by panfish aficionado Joel Nelson.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - Fishing for Summertime Bluegill and Crappie
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The gang from Sport Fishing TV chase big fish feeding on mullet swarms.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join the FishON! TV crew as we tackle rugged Northern Ontario terrain with our Polaris Ranger equipped with a custom boat rack. This remote expedition takes us deep into the wilderness to an untouched lake known for its walleye bounty. From the adrenaline of the journey to the thrill of the catch, this episode is packed with adventure, stunning scenery, and fishing tips you won’t want to miss!
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Trailblazing to Trophy Walleye: Polaris Ranger Adventure
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim and Capt Chris Adams, sight fish for Redfish at Mosquito Lagoon on the east coast of Florida.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | Redfish at Mosquito Lagoon
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fun, fun, fun, in the Mexico sun. In last week's episode, we arrived at Cedros Island and went Yellowtail fishing. Coming out of the gates, the Yellowtail were hungry and wanted to eat everything. This week Shea McIntee and some of the crew decided to mix it up and drive to another local island called Isla de San Benito, about two hours away, to see what it's all about.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Cedros Island Adventure, Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapman delivers top tips on how to catch the biggest fish in the best spots.
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro Vs Joe - Fishing giant bass at Camelot Bell
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jeremy Smith and Jeff Simpson head to Eagle Lake in Sunset Country to cast for big muskies during the summer to fall transition
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Giant Eagle Lake Muskies
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapman delivers top tips on how to catch the biggest fish in the best spots.
Video.grandparentTitle: Brent Chapman’s Pro vs Joe -Lazy Lake Shootout
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In this exciting episode of FishON!, we hit the legendary Bay of Quinte with none other than Dicki (Richard Sommerville), the ice fishing legend himself. With years of experience and a knack for finding trophy walleye, Dicki helps us navigate the ever-changing ice conditions and put our gear to the test. From early morning setups to heart-pounding battles with giant Quinte gold, this episode is packed with action, expert tips, and stunning winter scenery. Don't miss the ultimate ice fishing adventure!
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Ice Fishing Giants on Bay of Quinte

Image.alt: FishON | Ice Fishing Giants on Bay of Quinte
FishON | Ice Fishing Giants on Bay of Quinte
FishON | Ice Fishing Giants on Bay of Quinte

Video.summary: Lake X Largemouths
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast - Lake X Largemouths
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Host, Kim Stricker provides some underwaer insight while experiencing a substancial mayfly hatch in Indian River, MI. Mullett Lake is well-known for big smallmouth and the emerging bugs triggered feeding activity on the water's surface.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hook 'n Look — Indian River Hex Hatch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: On 9/11/2001, Bryan Anderson started basic training with the U.S. Army. A few months later he would find himself in the middle of the Iraq War as a military police officer. An IED Explosion would change his life forever, and Bryan would begin his new life as a triple amputee.
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - Army Veteran Bryan Anderson
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Al and James Lindner use the new Rapala PXR Mavrik 110 Jerkbait to catch both smallmouth and walleyes.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapman delivers top tips on how to catch the biggest fish in the best spots.
Video.grandparentTitle: Brent Chapmans Pro vs Joe-Finger Lakes Showdown
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapman delivers top tips on how to catch the biggest fish in the best spots.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: We're heading to Lake Gogebic this week to find some GIANT Perch and walleye! Joined by Chris Fish and Justin Soffa, this will surely be a fishing smackdown!
Video.title: Larry Smith Outdoors | Lake Gogebic Perch

Image.alt: Larry Smith Outdoors | Lake Gogebic Perch
Larry Smith Outdoors | Lake Gogebic Perch
Larry Smith Outdoors | Lake Gogebic Perch

Video.summary: We're heading to Lake Gogebic this week to find some GIANT Perch and walleye! Joined by Chris Fish and Justin Soffa, this will surely be a fishing smackdown!
Video.title: Larry Smith Outdoors | Lake Gogebic Perch

Image.alt: Larry Smith Outdoors | Lake Gogebic Perch
Larry Smith Outdoors | Lake Gogebic Perch
Larry Smith Outdoors | Lake Gogebic Perch

Video.summary: A few years back, three guys went fishing, but that just wasn't any day of fishing. Just when you least expected it, Matt Newman caught his personal best-spotted bass, and a few minutes later, Paul Bailey caught the World Record Spotted Bass that weighed 11.5 on four different scales. The nation went bonkers. Today those three same guys are going fishing again at one of the world's best bass fishing lakes. Welcome to Clear Lake!
Video.title: Stoked on Fishing — World Record Bass at Clear Lake Reunion

Image.alt: Stoked on Fishing — World Record Bass at Clear Lake Reunion
Stoked on Fishing — World Record Bass at Clear Lake Reunion
Stoked on Fishing — World Record Bass at Clear Lake Reunion

Video.summary: Shea McIntee and his brother Ryan McIntee explore the High Sierra lakes and catch three different trout species.
Video.title: Stoked On Fishing — The High Sierras, Pt. 3

Image.alt: Stoked On Fishing — The High Sierras, Pt. 3
Stoked On Fishing — The High Sierras, Pt. 3
Stoked On Fishing — The High Sierras, Pt. 3

Video.summary: At Venice, Louisiana, Shaw fishes with renowned captain Mike Frenette for trophy redfish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fly in with us to Blackbirch Lake with Gray Wood Outfitter for some non stop action
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Deep in the Northern Ontario wilderness, we team up with young angler Bradly for an unforgettable day on remote waters. The walleye action doesn’t come easy—we bounce between proven hotspots, searching for the roaming schools. But once we dial them in, the bite ignites. Bradly gets his first real taste of fishing sunken timber, battling a walleye that wraps itself deep in a submerged tree, and from there the action never lets up. A perfect day in the North.
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Timberline Walleye Chase

Video.summary: Jim visits Cast Industries to see how lure molds are made. Then he visits Lure Parts Online to show you how to pour your own soft plastic baits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Making Lure Molds & Pouring soft plastics
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin fishes brackish water for bass amd stipers
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin fishes a finesse topwater bait for bass in Early Summer
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows you how easy it is to build 3 different fish catching spinnerbaits.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Join Stoked On Fishing as we embark on a thrilling 6-day fishing expedition to the enchanted Island of Puerto Rico. Nestled along the west coast, we'll be based in the charming fishing town of La Pargueta and fishing along the west coast locations of Cabo Rojo and Rincon. Get ready for an unforgettable adventure filled with wide-open offshore and inshore fishing. Stoked On Puerto Rico
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | A Fisherman's Paradise: Stoked on Puerto Rico
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: On today's episode of AnglingBuzz TV, we're talking all about finding walleye and how to catch them! Our special guest is Jason Freed who's a fishing guide on Minnesota's famous Leech Lake.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Finding Bass on a river can mean covering miles of water
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A few years back, we rallied up with my buddy Chris Atkins who owns and operates Central America fishing. He told me, Shea, you have to do a Stoked On Fishing Charters Panama trip and fish at Coiba National Park. It's the largest island in Central America, next to the world-famous Hannibal Bank. Needless to say, we rallied up the troops and made our way down south; it's only six hours from LAX our first Adventure was incredible, and that's precisely why we're returning for our second time.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | Stoked on Coiba National Park, Panama: Part Four
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing can be very high-tech, but on the other end of the spectrum, it can actually be very simple. Today we're going to show you some presentations and tactics to put fish in the boat....easily!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This episode is all about Swimbaits, perhaps the most versatile tool in the tackle box for catching just about everything that swims.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dusitn takes on classic Fall conditions explaining the best ways to approach bass throughout the day.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim talks with custom lure painter Dave Blume about his creations.
Video.title: Episode 1
